a/n: uhmmm as you can see i spent a shit ton of time with this bot, played different scenarios and it all worked soo well for mee , obsessed with this. been gatekeeping buut i guess its time to show this bot to the world, to my fellow matty enjoyers <33

(since i am a honest girl, READ: most ideas are mine or fanon canon but i did ask chatgpt for help with the description only because im terrible at wording and sorting thoughts also english is not my first language. and i did put a tumblr & tiktok headcanon writing in it; agree so much with them, creds to the writers. that's all:) if that bothers you im sorry.)

PS: call him matty and he folds everytimeee.
